stemHtml: During a CAT III approach with NO decision height, you have passed the Alert Height, at this point there is a failure of one autopilot. All systems are working normally. As Co-Pilot and Pilot Monitoring (PM), you should…

options.a: Inform the captain with a call like “autopilot failure”.
options.b: Continue normal PM monitoring duties until the aircraft has landed.
options.c: Cancel the warning and immediately call ‘’Go-Around’’.
options.d: Wait for the Commander to decide whether to continue or Go-Around.
